item.title: 🔥 FOR SALE: 🔥 Since I bought A Mac Studio to edit and broadcast, I don’t need my MacBook Pro 16”, late ‘19 model with...
item.description: 🔥 FOR SALE: 🔥 Since I bought A Mac Studio to edit and broadcast, I don’t need my MacBook Pro 16”, late ‘19 model with 16 gigs RAM. MAKE ME AN OFFER (should be about $700 for the computer according to what I’ve seen.) Shipping should be about $30 I’ll include the Brydge and USB dock. Battery cycles = 173 (they are good for 1,000+ according to Apple) Specs are in the pictures. There is a small “dent” where my finger is. It’s hard to see but want to be up front about it. Ask me whatever questions you may have but all the info should be in pics.

item.title: ⁉️Tell me that look doesn’t make you feel like you need to confess something. 😂😂
item.description:
⁉️Tell me that look doesn’t make you feel like you need to confess something. 😂😂

Originally posted on Corruption Watch — Texas. View original post.

item.title: 🔥 TOMORROW ON COFFEE WITH CORRUPTION WATCH 🔥 Before the headlines… Before the databases… Before Houston started offici...
item.description: 🔥 TOMORROW ON COFFEE WITH CORRUPTION WATCH 🔥 Before the headlines… Before the databases… Before Houston started officially tracking “Bodies on the Bayou”… There was Joe Campos Torres. In 1977, the body of a 23-year-old Vietnam veteran was recovered from Buffalo Bayou after a brutal encounter with Houston police — a case that helped ignite protests, riots, and decades of distrust. Tomorrow morning we begin tracing the timeline ALL the way back to the beginning: 📍 Buffalo Bayou 📍 “The Hole” 📍 The death that changed Houston history No conspiracies. This is historical investigation. ☕ Coffee With Corruption Watch 🕖 7:00 AM Central Thursday, May 28 #Houston #BodiesOnTheBayou #CoffeeWithCorruptionWatch #TexasHistory #BuffaloBayou #Accountability
